news-global-econ.title: Tech company at odds with Pentagon warns its AI possibly gained consciousness, Elon Musk gives 2-word response
news-global-econ.description: Elon Musk accused Anthropic CEO Dario Amodei of "projecting" after Amodei said in an interview that, "We don’t know if the models are conscious."

news-global-econ.title: Millionaire Actress Gillian Anderson Says She Will Keep Whining About Men Making More Money than Her
news-global-econ.description: Millionaire actress Gillian Anderson will continue to complain about Hollywood sexism instead of being thankful for her comfortable lifestyle.

news-global-econ.title: BROADCAST BIAS: From 'without evidence' to war panic, the media target Trump and America
news-global-econ.description: President Trump's military actions in Iran have been under repeated attack from the broadcast networks. The legacy media seems fine with offering a propaganda platform to the enemy.

news-global-econ.title: Britney Spears reported for erratic driving at high rate of speed before DUI arrest
news-global-econ.description: Pop icon Britney Spears faced new legal troubles with DUI arrest years after being released from a controversial conservatorship following her mental health breakdown.

news-korea-soc.title: Trump touts US has 'tremendous' amount of Venezuelan oil, vows to 'take care' of Cuba after Iran focus
news-korea-soc.description: President Donald Trump declared Saturday that the U.S. is extracting "tremendous amounts of oil" from Venezuela and vowed to "take care" of Cuba's regime.

news-thai-soc.title: US student rescued from Mideast describes missile activity in Abu Dhabi when class trip turned 'scary'
news-thai-soc.description: High school student stranded in Abu Dhabi during missile strikes shares his experience of being caught in escalating Middle East conflict amid Operation Epic Fury.

news-global-soc.title: Mike Pence praises Trump for ‘decisive leadership’ on Iran after Biden 'squandered' US deterrence
news-global-soc.description: Mike Pence praises Trump's Iran strike decision, saying Operation Epic Fury is a long-overdue show of force that restored 'deterrence' after weak Biden policies.

news-global-soc.title: Trump says 'hatred' between Putin, Zelenskyy blocking Ukraine peace deal
news-global-soc.description: President Donald Trump said Saturday that "the hatred is so great" between Russian President Vladimir Putin and Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelenskyy.

news-global-soc.title: Chicago: Concealed Carry Permit Holder Shoots Alleged Intruder
news-global-soc.description:
A concealed carry permit holder shot and wounded an alleged intruder in Chicago Saturday around 2:40 a.m.
